summary: Excellent audience recording after a 2018 upgrade, delivering audio bliss despite no specific musical commentary
review: The recent 2018 upgrade of this audience tape is praised as crystal‑clear and complete, capturing the entire ’85 concert with “audio bliss.” No particular songs or performance nuances are mentioned, so the assessment focuses on the high technical quality.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one 5‑star review; reviewer highlights superb upgraded audio but provides no detail on musical performance, so rating leans toward recording excellence with limited confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: 2018 upgrade improves clarity and completeness; described as “audio bliss” with the full show intact.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure or individual performances; reviewer only notes overall completeness of the concert.
